detail.description: Hao-Yu Lee singles on a ground ball to center fielder Derek Hill. Eduardo Valencia to 2nd.
Tigers challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Hao-Yu Lee singles on a ground ball to third baseman Alec Bohm.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Henry Bolte.
Hao-Yu Lee homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith. Kerry Carpenter to 2nd.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jake Meyers.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Max Schuemann.

Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to right fielder Jasson Domínguez. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd. Hao-Yu Lee to 2nd. Spencer Torkelson advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Jasson Domínguez.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Riley Greene out at home on the throw, left fielder Cody Bellinger to catcher Austin Wells.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to right fielder Jasson Domínguez.
Hao-Yu Lee doubles (5) on a ground ball to left fielder Sam Antonacci.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a fly ball to shortstop Brayan Rocchio. Hao-Yu Lee out at 2nd, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to second baseman Travis Bazzana.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Angel Martínez. Riley Greene to 2nd.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a ground ball to right fielder Andrew McCutchen, deflected by second baseman Josh Smith. Kerry Carpenter scores.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a soft line drive to right fielder Ezequiel Duran. Spencer Torkelson scores. Wenceel Pérez to 3rd.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Blake Perkins. Riley Greene to 3rd. Spencer Torkelson to 2nd.
Hao-Yu Lee doubles (4) on a line drive to left fielder Yordan Alvarez.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a ground ball to left fielder Yordan Alvarez, deflected by shortstop Jeremy Peña. Spencer Torkelson scores.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brice Matthews.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell.
Umpire reviewed (stadium boundary call), call on the field was upheld: Hao-Yu Lee doubles (7) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Mike Trout. James Outman scores. Riley Greene scores.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to right fielder Carson Benge.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a fly ball to right fielder Carson Benge.
Hao-Yu Lee doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to center fielder Jarren Duran. Dillon Dingler scores. Kerry Carpenter to 2nd.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to center fielder Cedric Mullins.
Hao-Yu Lee homers (2) on a fly ball to right field.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a ground ball to third baseman Coby Mayo. Spencer Torkelson scores. Zach McKinstry to 2nd.
Hao-Yu Lee doubles (3) on a ground ball to left fielder Taylor Ward. Gage Workman scores.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to center fielder Justin Dean.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Ian Happ. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd. Gleyber Torres to 2nd.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a ground ball to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Matt Vierling scores. Kevin McGonigle scores. Spencer Torkelson to 2nd.
Hao-Yu Lee doubles (6) on a line drive to center fielder Spencer Jones. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd.
Hao-Yu Lee homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field. Zach McKinstry scores.
Hao-Yu Lee homers (1) on a fly ball to center field. Gleyber Torres scores.
Hao-Yu Lee triples (1) on a sharp fly ball to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Wenceel Pérez scores.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to left fielder Angel Martínez.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a ground ball to center fielder Rikuu Nishida.
Hao-Yu Lee doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski.
